title: Birthday Party Invitation
text:
## Birthday Party Invitation

You are invited to {person}'s {adjective} birthday party at {place}.

There will be {number} games, a {color} cake, and a professional {job} who can {verb} while {verb ending in -ing}.

Please bring one {object}, comfortable {clothing item}, and your favorite {animal} story.

Do not bring {plural noun}; last year they made everyone {emotion}.

RSVP by {day of week}, or we will mail you a {adjective} {noun} with {number} {plural noun}.
